mapper.sql: task_id, task_type, biz_type, status, file_id, file_name, result, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_lookup_task_t SET task_type = #{taskType}, biz_type = #{bizType}, status = #{status}, file_id = #{fileId}, file_name = #{fileName}, result = #{result}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
